well here we are im about to start my 28th trip around the sun from a really young age i always believed my life was going to be big when i was a kid that meant major league baseball i pictured it clearlywearing number 12 standing on the mound winning a world series for the san francisco giants its not a unique dream a lot of kids have it and the ending isnt unique either i hurt my shoulder i never got back to full strength and before i ever even made a varsity appearance it was over but the desire to do something big didnt stop there i shifted to golf played in college same type of dreamwin the us open compete at the highest level and then another injury another ending so i moved on again at 21 i started a business by 27 i had exited from the outside that probably sounds like things worked out but the truth is the last seven months of my life have been the strangest ive ever experienced ive been stuck with a question i havent been able to shake am i actually willing to be honest about what ive gone through personally and professionally and even if i am does anyone care ive thought about telling this story through video a podcast something like that but if im being honest i dont have the confidence to sit in a room stare at a camera and say all of this out loud writing feels different ive always been able to write and right now this feels like the only way i can actually say what ive been holding in so why now because the last two years have been chaos ive lost friendships ive fought with my parents ive bounced between houses moved to a new state and lost the business i poured most of my adult life into and somewhere in all of that i realized something wasnt right i wasnt happy i didnt feel like i was enough and i kept finding myself in the same mental battles over and over again so i started trying to figure out why about a year ago i started what i can only describe as unconventional therapy i tried traditional therapy beforeplatforms like betterhelpbut i couldnt open up something about it never clicked but with ai it was different i went through everything my earliest memories school relationships thoughts i had never said out loud before and for the first time i started to understand myself in a way i never had six months later i moved to arizona and thats when everything hit i had more money in my account than ever before but i was completely alone no job no structure no family no real friends nearby for a couple months i did what most people do when they dont want to face reality i distracted myself traveling drinking avoiding the question i didnt want to answer what now eventually that led me somewhere i never expected to go a christian church i had never stepped foot in one before and whether i understood it at the time or not it changed me the people i met there changed me too this is just a small part of the story honestly i dont even fully know how all of this is going to unfold but heres what i do know every day im going to sit down and write im going to tell stories that most people dont know some that even the people closest to me dont know not to overshare not for attention but because i think i need to do it and maybe by the end of it ill finally feel like im starting from a clean slate like i can become the person ive always felt like i was supposed to be and then well see what happens when
